file_insights.insight: Added Hilt Android plugin dependency with version 2.44 and 'apply false' flag in root-level plugins block. This is the correct pattern for dependency management in multi-module Android projects.
Local Claude settings file was removed. This contained permission rules for MCP operations and sequential thinking.
Multiple Gradle cache directories created across versions 7.0.2, 7.6.3, and 8.2. Indicates gradle sync/build was executed. These are typically gitignored artifacts.

patterns_discovered.pattern: Root-level plugin declaration with apply false
patterns_discovered.description: Hilt plugin declared at root level with 'apply false' - follows Kotlin DSL best practices for centralized dependency management
patterns_discovered.benefit: Allows child modules to apply the plugin without redeclaring versions

patterns_discovered.description: Hilt version explicitly pinned to 2.44, not using dynamic versions
patterns_discovered.benefit: Ensures reproducible builds and explicit version control

patterns_discovered.description: Gradle caches for versions 7.0.2, 7.6.3, and 8.2 all present
patterns_discovered.implication: Project may support multiple gradle versions or underwent recent gradle updates

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Gradle cache files committed to repository
gotchas_discovered.description: Multiple .gradle/ directories with binary lock files, checksums, and execution history are being committed. These are build artifacts that should typically be gitignored.
gotchas_discovered.risk: Repository bloat and potential merge conflicts from cache differences across environments

gotchas_discovered.description: Project uses AGP 4.2.2 (from previous plugins block) with Hilt 2.44. Need to verify compatibility.
gotchas_discovered.risk: Version mismatch could cause build failures in dependent modules

gotchas_discovered.description: .claude/settings.local.json was deleted, which may indicate environment-specific configuration changes
gotchas_discovered.risk: MCP permissions and sequential thinking settings were lost

approach_outcome.completion_notes: Successfully added Hilt Android plugin (v2.44) to root build.gradle.kts in first attempt using correct syntax and best practices

recommendations.rationale: Gradle cache files and lock files should not be committed to version control as they are generated artifacts

recommendations.recommendation: Apply Hilt plugin to module-level build.gradle.kts files
recommendations.rationale: Hilt is declared at root level but must be applied to individual modules (app and any library modules) to take effect

recommendations.recommendation: Verify Hilt 2.44 compatibility with AGP 4.2.2 and Kotlin 1.5.31
recommendations.rationale: Ensure version compatibility across the build stack to prevent runtime issues
Capture why Hilt 2.44 was chosen and any specific configuration requirements for future maintainability

recommendations.recommendation: Consider restoring .claude/settings.local.json if MCP access was needed
recommendations.rationale: The deletion may have been unintentional and could affect subsequent automation tasks
